_comment: App project (Vite-built, not part of the `tsc -b` reference graph). Non-composite + noEmit: Vite/Rolldown owns the bundle, tsc only typechecks. `types` is left to auto-discovery so @types/react and @types/react-dom are picked up (vite/client globals come from src/vite-env.d.ts). `rootDirs` overlays React Router's generated route types (`.react-router/types`) so route modules can `import type { Route } from "./+types/<name>"`.
